title: xxd
html:
xxd

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

xxd /path/to/input-file | xxd -r

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo DATA | xxd | xxd -r - /path/to/output-file
excerpt: xxd File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged xxd /path/to/input-file | xxd -r File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo DATA | xxd | xxd -r - /path/to/output-file
